description_long: This ottoman features a robust wooden frame with intricately turned legs and vertical slat side panels, giving it a traditional and sturdy appearance. The seating area is generously cushioned and covered with a richly patterned textile in deep red and earthy tones, adorned with geometric motifs reminiscent of Persian or Central Asian designs. Three large, matching cushions provide back and side support, each displaying the same ornate pattern as the main seat. The wood appears to be finished in a natural, warm tone, complementing the vibrant upholstery. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban settings such as patios, parks, or verandas. The ottoman's design blends decorative and functional elements, making it both a statement piece and a practical seating solution.
description: A traditional wooden ottoman with turned legs and slatted sides, featuring richly patterned red and earth-toned cushions with geometric motifs. The piece combines sturdy woodwork with ornate, comfortable upholstery.
description_view_0: Front angle showing the turned wooden legs, slatted sides, and three patterned cushions, with the main seat and backrest clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the ottoman, the vertical slats, and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the symmetry of the slatted panels and the arrangement of the cushions along the back and side.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full patterned surface of the seat and the placement of the three large cushions.
